notes: Batch F (AI blocklist/conversation): 61 entries total. Translations: 45 UI strings. Flags: 4 panic_message (3 in cli.rs Keystroke .expect() and exchange .expect(), 1 in code_diff_view try_emit_diffs_saved .expect()), 2 telemetry_payload in code_diff_view safe_error! (safe/full pair for FailedToSave event — toast text 'Failed to save file {file_path_clone}' on L659 IS translated, the safe_error! macro args on L655-656 are not). conversation_yaml.rs: 4 protocol_key entries (options/lines/ranges/selected_options — YAML schema keys emitted as serialization output by write_*_yaml functions; all match pattern '    <key>:\n'). 6 telemetry_payload in conversation_yaml.rs (Failed to create/write/temp dir/base dir/subdir + 'No root task found' — all flow through Result<String,String> -> log::error! + FetchConversationResult::Error to LLM-facing writer in agent_sdk/driver/output.rs L298, not user UI). 'Settings > AI' (id 01KQXQV12FA14PFYNZ6NWQR98Q) is the URL/href arg of FormattedTextFragment::hyperlink — translated as visible breadcrumb '设置 > AI' since the click handler is overridden to dispatch ShowSettingsPage so the URL only serves as display/tooltip. 'Take over' vs 'Take control' translated distinctly ('接管' vs '取得控制') to preserve UI distinction between reject+user-takes-over-input button and the transfer-control button. ASCII '…' (U+2026) in source converted to full-width '……' per contract §5.
